summary: Finso multi-currency finance app tested end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed covering /api/rates, /api/seed (force & idempotent), /api/summary, accounts, cards, transactions (list/filter/USD->TRY conversion with account balance adjustment), investments (create/patch). All responses verified to exclude MongoDB _id. Frontend: dashboard loads with net worth ₺612.078,95, donut chart with 4 categories renders, currency toggle (TRY/USD/RUB) visible & functional, Yatırım K/Z chip green (+39.90%), Kart Borcu shown. All 4 tabs (Panel/Cüzdan/Harcamalar/Yatırımlar) navigate. Wallet shows accounts with TRY equivalents for USD/RUB. Expenses shows Günlük/Haftalık/Aylık chips, search input, category chips and category breakdown bars. Investments shows portfolio total, P&L chip, filter chips (Tümü/Hisse/Kripto/Altın/Fon), per-row quantity/cost/current value/P&L%. Add transaction modal opens with Gider/Gelir toggle, amount input, currency selector, category grid, note, Kaydet.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow*' and 'textShadow*' style props deprecated — use 'boxShadow'/'textShadow'. props.pointerEvents deprecated — use style.pointerEvents. Non-blocking but should be migrated.

action_items: Optional: migrate deprecated shadow*/textShadow*/pointerEvents props to new style API to silence RN web warnings.
Optional: confirm testID naming for CurrencyToggle individual buttons (expected currency-toggle-TRY/USD/RUB) — UI works but those exact testIDs were not discoverable. Not a blocker.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend cleanly excludes Mongo _id in all GETs via projection.
Rate caching (6h) with fallback rates is implemented correctly.
Transaction account balance adjustment correctly converts cross-currency via TRY.
Seed endpoint is idempotent without force and full-replaces with force=true.
Server.py at ~430 lines is within limits; no splitting required yet.
seed_data_creation: Used built-in POST /api/seed?force=true which seeded 5 accounts, 3 cards, 14 transactions, 6 investments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://finso-finance.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend env key is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_finso_api.py can be reused. Seed via POST /api/seed?force=true before regression.
